name: sendowl
description: Reads SendOwl orders, products, subscriptions, discounts, bundles, and licenses, and writes product/subscription/discount/bundle lifecycle mutations and order actions (refund, cancel subscription, resend email) through the SendOwl API.

risk.read: external SendOwl API read of order, product, subscription, discount, bundle, and license data
risk.write: external SendOwl API mutation, including a real financial refund action (refund_order)
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes
